title: euonymus alatus var. striatus
intro: Euonymus alatus var. striatus, also known as the Paperbark Maple or Striped Euonymus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Euonymus family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euonymus alatus var. striatus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
